name: Centella Asiatica
description: A legendary soothing herb known for its wound-healing and anti-inflammatory properties.
scientificSummary: Contains triterpene saponins (like madecassoside) that stimulate collagen synthesis and have potent anti-inflammatory effects.
mechanismOfAction: Increases antioxidant activity at the site of wounds, strengthening the skin and increasing blood supply to the area.

seo.title: Centella Asiatica - The Ultimate Soothing Herb | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the healing power of Cica for sensitive and irritated skin.
